    databaseManager - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.main.Main
    Database manager instance, responsible for all database interactions.
    DatabaseManager - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers
    Simple DatabaseManager for SQLite.
    DatabaseManager(String, String) - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.DatabaseManager
    Open (or create) the SQLite database at path/fileName.
    DatabaseManager.ResultMapper<T> - Schnittstelle in ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers
    Functional interface for mapping a ResultSet row to an object of type T.

    Standard-Schriftfamilie, falls keine Einstellung vorhanden ist.
    deleteArticle(Article) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.ArticleManager
    Delete an article from the database
    deleteArticleByNumber(String) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.ArticleManager
    Delete an article from the database by its article number
    deleteClient(String) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.ClientManager
    Deletes a client from the database.
    deleteDepartment(String) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.DepartmentManager
    Deletes the department with the given name from the database.
    deleteLog(int) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.LogManager
    Deletes a log entry from the database by its unique identifier (id).
    deleteNote(String) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.NotesManager
    Deletes a note from the database based on its title.
    deleteOldLogs(int) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.LogManager
    Deletes log entries that are older than the specified number of days.

    Displays the ArticleGUI window.
    display() - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.ArticleListGUI
    Brings the window to the front if it's already visible, or makes it visible if it's not.

    Displays this GUI on the Event Dispatch Thread (EDT).
    display() - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.EditOrderGUI
    Displays the EditOrderGUI window on the Event Dispatch Thread to ensure thread safety and proper GUI rendering.

    Displays the main GUI window by making it visible.

    Makes the current component visible by setting its visibility state to true.
